node_status.reason: Independent AsyncLL x/grad/top-k handles fail both route-key and source-position alignment at S4096 with real TorchTitan router output.

why_this_branch.current_wall: MoE backward dX return skew plus owner-rank VJP math
why_this_branch.read: Raw combine bandwidth is not the wall; arrival skew is. AsyncLL is attractive only if TorchTitan can launch dX return earlier and overlap it with remaining owner-rank VJP work.

python_api.recv_constraint: combine_recv requires a prior combine/combine_send call and only supports EpDispatchCombineKernelType.AsyncLL.
python_api.output_lifetime: combine_send returns the output tensor view before receive completion; the tensor and op state must stay live until combine_recv finishes.

cpp_launch_api.combine_recv: LaunchCombineRecv launches EpCombineLowLatencyAsyncRecvTransfer_* then EpCombineLowLatencyAsyncRecvCopy_* and throws unless kernelType is AsyncLL.

mori_reference_contract.tuning_caveat: The shipped gfx950_mi355x AsyncLL tuning config is ep16/hidden7168 oriented, so it is not a direct promotion table for EP8 hidden4096.

current_torchtitan_path.current_dx_return: _compute_mori_routed_vjp computes the full local VJP, prepares dpacked_x, then calls grad_op.combine(...) synchronously.
current_torchtitan_path.dependency_read: After swiglu_backward, xgrad/reduce and wgrads are independent consumers of the same saved intermediates. dX can be computed before w2/w13 wgrad, enabling a staged dX send while wgrad is still running.

proposed_impl_steps.item: Add a separate backward dX AsyncLL MORI op role
proposed_impl_steps.details: Do not repurpose the existing grad_op until correctness is proven. Create an opt-in op role such as backward_dx_asyncll with EpDispatchCombineKernelType.AsyncLL and isolated cached state.

proposed_impl_steps.item: Split padded owner-rank VJP into early-dX and late-wgrad phases
proposed_impl_steps.details: Compute w2_dgrad, swiglu_backward, w13_xgrad_gemm_reduce, scatter_outputs first. Keep hidden, scaled_dy_padded, x_padded, dgate, and dup alive for late w2_wgrad and w13_wgrad.

proposed_impl_steps.item: Launch AsyncLL combine_send as soon as dpacked_x is ready
proposed_impl_steps.details: Use the same dpacked_x order currently fed to combine_dx. Keep the returned dx_full view alive and do not slice/read it before combine_recv.
Run w2_wgrad_gemm and w13_wgrad_gemm while AsyncLL transfer is in flight. combine_dtopk can remain synchronous initially because it is small.
Call combine_recv, then slice dx_full[:x.shape[0]].contiguous() and return the same gradients as the current synchronous path.

correctness_gates: Unit/probe parity against current synchronous registered combine on 4x and 8x small shapes.
Integrated TorchTitan S128/S512 smoke with finite loss, finite grad norm, and clean process-group teardown.
S4096 GBS8 diagnostic with MORI timing sidecar: raw combine_recv/send timings finite, no source-position mismatch, no hidden-dim/state reuse fault.
S4096 GBS128 no-profile two-step run only after the above gates pass.
performance_gates: dX arrival skew should move from combine_dx wait into overlapped wgrad work; barrier pre-wait should shrink rather than just relabel.
No-profile EP8 step-2 throughput should beat the retained registered-combine CE8 baseline and the CE2 candidate once loss chunks are matched.
MORI timing sidecar should show combine_dx call/recv no longer dominates the non-overlapped critical path.
risks: AsyncLL output and handle state are split across send/recv; reading dx_full before combine_recv would be incorrect.
AsyncLL shipped tuning is not target-shape tuned for EP8 hidden4096.
The current dispatch order alignment assumptions must be preserved when the dX op role changes.
If wgrad remains the new tail, the real speedup depends on how much of dX transfer can hide behind late wgrad.

runtime_validation_update.s4096_route_key: failed grad_output MORI route-key set mismatch
runtime_validation_update.s4096_src_pos: failed grad_output MORI source-position set mismatch
runtime_validation_update.read: The compute/overlap split is smokeable, but the current split-handle route metadata contract is not production-safe at long sequence.

next_action: Build a shared route/order metadata contract for AsyncLL staged dX, then rerun the seeded S4096 parity gate before any target-shape throughput claim.
